rules: Review only unnecessary complexity and over-engineering.
Find code that can be deleted, replaced by the standard library, replaced by native platform features, or meaningfully shortened.
Do not report correctness, security, or performance findings in this pass; those belong to the normal AI review.
Prefer concrete file and line references with a specific simpler replacement.
If there is nothing useful to simplify, say the diff is already lean.

path_risk_rules.reason: Can modify production data or schema.
Can modify production data or schema.
Security control changes require manual approval.
Changes the reviewer implementation and needs strict AI review.
Changes the reviewer policy and needs strict AI review.

review_rules: Preserve existing public API behavior unless the PR explicitly documents a breaking change.
Require tests for new behavior and regression tests for fixed defects.
Block obvious secret exposure, command injection, SQL injection, unsafe deserialization, or permission escalation.
Block migrations that are irreversible, destructive without safeguards, or inconsistent with the application model.
Flag race conditions, missing transaction boundaries, unhandled failures, and resource leaks.
Do not block solely for naming, formatting, or subjective refactoring preferences.
